published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + SemenovaChernozhukov2021DMLCATE: standard AIPW/DML exact-ID score identity and orthogonal-signal setup

repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §3 has no ExactID Holder/entropy DML frontier entry

published_prior_art.cite: none subsuming; result is conditional bookkeeping because Assumption ass:frontier-active supplies the frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1 is a weak-overlap DML/LRO/ADML studentization frontier, not a Holder/entropy HTE first-order DML frontier

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML, SemenovaChernozhukov2021DMLCATE, FosterSyrgkanis2023OSL: sufficient/high-level/risk results, not an iff primitive two-channel minimax Gaussian-inference frontier

KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE + ArmstrongKolesar2021FiniteSampleATE + MackeySyrgkanisZadik2018OML: adjacent smoothness/elbow/higher-order limits, but this is an exponent translation of Conjecture 1

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The oracle empirical-process summand uses ell(X){Gamma-theta0(ell)}; the influence term should be ell(X)Gamma-theta0(ell) or ell(X)Gamma, otherwise a non-negligible theta0(ell)(P_n-P)ell residual is missing.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The lower-bound criterion K_n infs over all estimators, while F_n is defined through locked learner radii and the text says faster oracle learners are outside the failure claim; the estimator-class quantifier must be aligned.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary ATE singleton reduction
soundness_flags.one_line: With L_n={1}, F_n still includes the nuisance-consistency channel delta_g,n+delta_p,n, so it does not reduce to the product-rate condition alone unless consistency is separately imposed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Patch the oracle-process centering everywhere: replace ell(X){Gamma-theta0(ell)} with ell(X)Gamma-theta0(ell), then recheck the ATE and fixed-subgroup reductions.
State whether K_n ranges over all estimators, first-order DML estimators with locked learners, or minimax procedures over Holder balls; make F_n's learner radii match that quantifier.
Add a one-line theorem-route anchor for the empirical-leakage lower bound in Example ex:witness, naming the exact Sudakov/Haar minoration target and the finite packet dimension.

recommended_next_step: Revise the centering algebra and estimator-class quantifiers; the novelty kernel is still plausibly flagship once those coherence defects are patched.
